_comment: Copy this file to config.local.json and fill in your values. config.local.json is gitignored.
_chrome_profile_help: Name of the Chrome profile signed into all 4 AI platforms. Use a dedicated profile if possible. Default Chrome profile is named 'Default'.
_notion_help: Optional. If enabled, the agent will mirror session status to a Notion database and append a summary toggle to a dashboard page. Setup steps are in README.md.
